rv_cc_12: Realized vol: trailing std of 1-bar log returns, 12-bar window.
rv_cc_48: Realized vol: trailing std of 1-bar log returns, 48-bar window.
rv_cc_288: Realized vol: trailing std of 1-bar log returns, 288-bar window.
rv_gk_12: Garman-Klass realized vol, 12-bar trailing mean of per-bar GK variance, sqrt.
rv_gk_48: Garman-Klass realized vol, 48-bar trailing mean of per-bar GK variance, sqrt.
rv_gk_288: Garman-Klass realized vol, 288-bar trailing mean of per-bar GK variance, sqrt.
vov_48: Vol-of-vol: 48-bar std of rv_cc_12 divided by its 48-bar mean (coefficient of variation).
rv48_prank_30d: Percentile rank of rv_cc_48 within trailing 30 days (min 5d warmup).
range_prank_30d: Percentile rank of relative bar range (high-low)/close within trailing 30 days.
ret_1: Log return over past 1 bars (5 min).
retn_1: ret_1 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(1) (trailing-vol units).
ret_3: Log return over past 3 bars (15 min).
retn_3: ret_3 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(3) (trailing-vol units).
ret_6: Log return over past 6 bars (30 min).
retn_6: ret_6 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(6) (trailing-vol units).
ret_12: Log return over past 12 bars (60 min).
retn_12: ret_12 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(12) (trailing-vol units).
ret_24: Log return over past 24 bars (120 min).
retn_24: ret_24 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(24) (trailing-vol units).
ret_48: Log return over past 48 bars (240 min).
retn_48: ret_48 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(48) (trailing-vol units).
ret_96: Log return over past 96 bars (480 min).
retn_96: ret_96 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(96) (trailing-vol units).
ret_288: Log return over past 288 bars (1440 min).
retn_288: ret_288 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(288) (trailing-vol units).
er_12: Kaufman efficiency ratio |net move|/sum|moves| over 12 bars (0=chop, 1=trend).
er_48: Kaufman efficiency ratio |net move|/sum|moves| over 48 bars (0=chop, 1=trend).
er_288: Kaufman efficiency ratio |net move|/sum|moves| over 288 bars (0=chop, 1=trend).
adx_14: Wilder ADX(14) on 5m bars, scaled to [0,1]: trend strength regardless of direction.
dmi_14: Signed directional index (+DI - -DI)/(+DI + -DI), Wilder 14: trend direction in [-1,1].
sma_z_12: Distance of close from 12-bar SMA in units of 12-bar close std (trailing).
sma_z_48: Distance of close from 48-bar SMA in units of 48-bar close std (trailing).
sma_z_288: Distance of close from 288-bar SMA in units of 288-bar close std (trailing).
body_range: Candle body / range (close-open)/(high-low), 0 when range is 0; in [-1,1].
wick_up_share: Upper wick as a share of bar range; 0 on zero-range bars.
wick_dn_share: Lower wick as a share of bar range; 0 on zero-range bars.
body_z_48: Signed relative candle body (close-open)/close, z-scored over trailing 48 bars.
consec_runs: Signed count of consecutive same-sign 5m closes (capped at 12, scaled to [-1,1]).
vol_z_12: z-score of log(1+volume) over trailing 12 bars.
vol_z_48: z-score of log(1+volume) over trailing 48 bars.
vol_z_288: z-score of log(1+volume) over trailing 288 bars.
trades_z_48: z-score of log(1+trade count) over trailing 48 bars.
trades_z_288: z-score of log(1+trade count) over trailing 288 bars.
ti_raw: Signed taker imbalance 2*taker_base/volume - 1 (spot), in [-1,1]; 0 on empty bars.
ti_z_48: z-score of spot taker imbalance over trailing 48 bars.
ti_persist_12: Mean sign of taker imbalance over last 12 bars (persistence, in [-1,1]).
ats_z_48: Avg trade size log(1+volume/trades) z-scored over trailing 48 bars.
ats_z_288: Avg trade size log(1+volume/trades) z-scored over trailing 288 bars.
large_flow_ema12: EMA(12) of taker imbalance gated to bars with avg-trade-size z>1 (large/institutional flow).
small_flow_ema12: EMA(12) of taker imbalance gated to bars with avg-trade-size z<-1 (retail/small flow).
lf_x_retn6: Interaction: large-trade flow EMA12 * vol-normalized 6-bar return (does big flow confirm the move).
sf_x_retn6: Interaction: small-trade flow EMA12 * vol-normalized 6-bar return (retail chasing proxy).
m1_ti_mean: Mean of 1m taker imbalances inside the 5m bar.
m1_ti_last: Taker imbalance of the last 1m sub-bar (freshest flow).
m1_maxmove_share: Max |1m log move| inside the bar / 5m log range: 1 = move concentrated in one minute.
m1_sign_agree: Within-bar consecutive 1m return sign-agreement count (0-4) scaled to [-1,1]: momentum vs chop.
m1_last_retn: Last 1m log return normalized by 1m-scaled trailing vol (rv_cc_48/sqrt(5)): freshest momentum.
perp_ti_z_48: z-score of perp taker imbalance over trailing 48 bars.
perp_share_z_288: Perp volume share perp/(perp+spot), z-scored over trailing 288 bars (ffill limit 12).
perp_spot_ti_gap: Perp minus spot taker-imbalance EMA(12) gap: derivative-led vs spot-led flow.
